name: Moist'n Creamy Coconut Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Package Yellow Cake Mix (2 layer size) -OR-
1 Package Yellow Cake Mix, with pudding in mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix according to the package instructions and bake it in a 9x13 pan.
2. Allow the cake to cool for about 15 minutes, then poke holes in the warm cake with a utility fork.
3. In a saucepan, combine milk and sugar. Cook over medium heat until boiling, then reduce heat and let simmer for 1 minute.
4. Stir in half of the coconut flakes and pour the mixture evenly over the warm cake.
5. Allow the cake to cool completely.
6. Fold half of the remaining coconut into the whipped topping and spread it over the cooled cake.
7. Sprinkle the rest of the coconut on top and refrigerate the cake overnight.
8. Store any leftover cake in the refrigerator.
